title: Example 6-12 number of cycles to a fatigue failure using multiple criteria

notes: This file follows Example 6-12 on p321-p322.
The problem statement uses sigma_max = 60 kpsi and sigma_min = -20 kpsi.
The finite-life S-N constants are built from Sut, Se, and f directly as in the textbook example.
The life for each criterion is estimated by converting the fluctuating stress state to an equivalent completely reversed stress.
